sentence.content: Good morning everyone, and welcome to the Museum of Farming Life.
sentence.content_zh: 大家早上好，欢迎来到农耕生活博物馆。

sentence.content: I understand it’s your first visit here, so I’d like to give you some background information about the museum and then explain a little about what you can see during your visit.
sentence.content_zh: 我知道这是你们第一次来这里，所以我想给你们一些关于博物馆的背景信息，并解释一下你们在参观期间可以看到的一些内容。

sentence.content: So, where we’re standing at the moment is the entrance to a large building that was constructed in 1880 as the home of a local businessman, Alfred Palmer, of the Palmer biscuit factory.
sentence.content_zh: 现在我们站的地方是一个大建筑的入口，这个建筑在1880年建成，是当地商人阿尔弗雷德·帕尔默的家，也是帕尔默饼干工厂的所在地。

sentence.content: It was later sold and became a hall of residence for students in 1911, and a museum in 1951. In 2005, a modern extension was built to accommodate the museum’s collections.
sentence.content_zh: 后来它被出售并于1911年成为学生宿舍，1951年成为一座博物馆。在2005年，我们建造了一个现代化的扩建，用于展示博物馆的藏品。

sentence.content: The museum’s owned by the university, and apart from two rooms that are our offices, the university uses the main part of the building.
sentence.content_zh: 博物馆由大学所有，除了两个办公室外，大学使用建筑的主要部分。

sentence.content: You may see students going into the building for lessons, but it’s not open to museum visitors, I’m afraid.
sentence.content_zh: 你可能会看到学生进入建筑上课，但对于博物馆的参观者来说，建筑是不开放的，很遗憾。

sentence.content: It’s a shame because the interior architectural features are outstanding, especially the room that used to be the library.
sentence.content_zh: 这是一种遗憾，因为室内的建筑特色非常出色，尤其是曾经是图书馆的那个房间。

sentence.content: Luckily, we’ve managed to keep entry to the museum free.
sentence.content_zh: 幸运的是，我们成功地保持了博物馆的免费入场。

sentence.content: This includes access to all the galleries, outdoor areas and the rooms for special exhibitions.
sentence.content_zh: 这包括进入所有的展览馆、室外区域和特别展览的房间。

sentence.content: We run activities for children and students, such as the museum club, for which there’s no charge.
sentence.content_zh: 我们为儿童和学生开展活动，比如博物馆俱乐部，没有收费。

sentence.content: We do have a donation box just over there so feel free to give whatever amount you consider appropriate.
sentence.content_zh: 我们有一个捐款箱就在那边，所以请随意捐款，任何你认为合适的金额都可以。

sentence.content: We do have a cloakroom, if you’d like to leave your coats and bags somewhere.
sentence.content_zh: 我们有一个衣帽间，如果你想把外套和包放在某个地方的话。

sentence.content: Unlike other museums, photography is allowed here, so you might like to keep your cameras with you.
sentence.content_zh: 与其他博物馆不同，这里允许拍照，所以你可以随身携带相机。

sentence.content: You might be more comfortable not carrying around heavy rucksacks, though keep your coats and jackets on as it’s quite cold in the museum garden today.
sentence.content_zh: 不过，你可能会觉得不用背着沉重的背包会更舒服，不过还是保持穿着外套，因为博物馆花园里今天相当冷。

sentence.content: I’d like to tell you about the different areas of the museum.
sentence.content_zh: 我想告诉你们关于博物馆的不同区域。

sentence.content: Just inside, and outside the main gallery, we have an area called Four Seasons.
sentence.content_zh: 就在入口内部和主展厅外面，有一个叫做四季的区域。

sentence.content: Here you can watch a four-minute animation of a woodland scene. It was designed especially for the museum by a group of young people on a film studies course, and it’s beautiful.
sentence.content_zh: 在这里，你可以观看一个四分钟的动画木地板场景。这是由一组电影学专业的年轻人为博物馆特别设计的，非常美丽。

sentence.content: Children absolutely love it, but then, so do adults.
sentence.content_zh: 孩子们非常喜欢，成年人也一样。

sentence.content: The main gallery’s called Town and Country.
sentence.content_zh: 主展厅叫做城市与乡村。

sentence.content: It includes a photographic collection of prizewinning sheep and shepherds.
sentence.content_zh: 它包括了一个奖-winning的羊和牧羊人的摄影收藏。

sentence.content: Leaving Town and Country, you enter Farmhouse Kitchen, which is … well, self-explanatory.
sentence.content_zh: 离开城市与乡村，你进入农家厨房，这是...不言自明的。

sentence.content: Here we have the oldest collection of equipment for making butter and cheese in the country.
sentence.content_zh: 这里有国内最古老的制作黄油和奶酪设备收藏。

sentence.content: And this morning, a specialist cheesemaker will be giving demonstrations of how it’s produced.
sentence.content_zh: 今天早上，一位专业的奶酪制造商将会进行示范。

sentence.content: You may even get to try some.
sentence.content_zh: 你甚至可以尝一些。

sentence.content: After that, you can go in two directions.
sentence.content_zh: 在那之后，你可以选择两个方向。

sentence.content: To the right is a staircase that takes you up to a landing from where you can look down on the galleries.
sentence.content_zh: 向右边是一条楼梯，可以带你上到一个平台，从那里你可以俯瞰展览馆。

sentence.content: To the left is a room called A Year on the Farm.
sentence.content_zh: 向左边是一个叫做农场一年的房间。

sentence.content: There’s lots of seating here as sometimes we use the room for school visits, so it’s a good place to stop for a rest.
sentence.content_zh: 这里有很多座位，因为有时候我们会用这个房间接待学校参观，所以这是一个休息的好地方。

sentence.content: If you’re feeling competitive, you can take our memory test in which you answer questions about things you’ve seen in the museum.
sentence.content_zh: 如果你有竞争心，你可以参加我们的记忆测试，回答关于你在博物馆看到的事物的问题。

sentence.content: The next area’s called Wagon Walk. This contains farm carts from nearly every part of the country.
sentence.content_zh: 接下来的区域叫做马车步行区。这里有来自全国各地的农用马车。

sentence.content: It’s surprising how much regional variation there was.
sentence.content_zh: 令人惊讶的是，各地的差异非常大。

sentence.content: Beside the carts are display boards with information about each one.
sentence.content_zh: 马车旁边有展板，上面有关于每个马车的信息。

sentence.content: The carts are old and fragile, so we ask you to keep your children close to you and ensure they don’t climb on the carts.
sentence.content_zh: 马车古老而脆弱，所以我们要求你们让孩子靠近你们，并确保他们不要爬上马车。

sentence.content: From Wagon Walk, you can either make your way back to reception or go out into the garden – or even go back to take another look in the galleries.
sentence.content_zh: 从马车步行区，你可以返回接待处，或者走出去到花园，甚至可以回去再看一下展览馆。

sentence.content: In the far corner of the garden is Bees are Magic, but we’re redeveloping this area so you can’t visit that at the moment.
sentence.content_zh: 在花园的远角是一个叫做蜜蜂的魔法的地方，但我们正在重新开发这个区域，所以目前无法参观。

sentence.content: You can still buy our honey in the shop, though.
sentence.content_zh: 不过你仍然可以在商店购买我们的蜂蜜。

sentence.content: Finally, there’s The Pond, which contains all kinds of interesting wildlife.
sentence.content_zh: 最后，有一个叫做池塘的地方，那里有各种有趣的野生动物。

sentence.content: There are baby ducks that are only a few days old, as well as tiny frogs. The Pond isn’t deep and there’s a fence around it, so it’s perfectly safe for children.
sentence.content_zh: 有几天大的小鸭子，还有小青蛙。池塘不深，周围有围栏，所以对孩子来说是完全安全的。

sentence.content: Good morning everyone, and welcome to the Museum of Farming Life.
sentence.content_zh: 大家早上好，欢迎来到农耕生活博物馆。

sentence.content: I understand it’s your first visit here, so I’d like to give you some background information about the museum and then explain a little about what you can see during your visit.
sentence.content_zh: 我知道这是你们第一次来这里，所以我想给你们一些关于博物馆的背景信息，并解释一下你们在参观期间可以看到的一些内容。

sentence.content: So, where we’re standing at the moment is the entrance to a large building that was constructed in 1880 as the home of a local businessman, Alfred Palmer, of the Palmer biscuit factory.
sentence.content_zh: 现在我们站的地方是一个大建筑的入口，这个建筑在1880年建成，是当地商人阿尔弗雷德·帕尔默的家，也是帕尔默饼干工厂的所在地。

sentence.content: It was later sold and became a hall of residence for students in 1911, and a museum in 1951. In 2005, a modern extension was built to accommodate the museum’s collections.
sentence.content_zh: 后来它被出售并于1911年成为学生宿舍，1951年成为一座博物馆。在2005年，我们建造了一个现代化的扩建，用于展示博物馆的藏品。

sentence.content: The museum’s owned by the university, and apart from two rooms that are our offices, the university uses the main part of the building.
sentence.content_zh: 博物馆由大学所有，除了两个办公室外，大学使用建筑的主要部分。

sentence.content: You may see students going into the building for lessons, but it’s not open to museum visitors, I’m afraid.
sentence.content_zh: 你可能会看到学生进入建筑上课，但对于博物馆的参观者来说，建筑是不开放的，很遗憾。

sentence.content: It’s a shame because the interior architectural features are outstanding, especially the room that used to be the library.
sentence.content_zh: 这是一种遗憾，因为室内的建筑特色非常出色，尤其是曾经是图书馆的那个房间。

sentence.content: Luckily, we’ve managed to keep entry to the museum free.
sentence.content_zh: 幸运的是，我们成功地保持了博物馆的免费入场。

sentence.content: This includes access to all the galleries, outdoor areas and the rooms for special exhibitions.
sentence.content_zh: 这包括进入所有的展览馆、室外区域和特别展览的房间。

sentence.content: We run activities for children and students, such as the museum club, for which there’s no charge.
sentence.content_zh: 我们为儿童和学生开展活动，比如博物馆俱乐部，没有收费。

sentence.content: We do have a donation box just over there so feel free to give whatever amount you consider appropriate.
sentence.content_zh: 我们有一个捐款箱就在那边，所以请随意捐款，任何你认为合适的金额都可以。

sentence.content: We do have a cloakroom, if you’d like to leave your coats and bags somewhere.
sentence.content_zh: 我们有一个衣帽间，如果你想把外套和包放在某个地方的话。

sentence.content: Unlike other museums, photography is allowed here, so you might like to keep your cameras with you.
sentence.content_zh: 与其他博物馆不同，这里允许拍照，所以你可以随身携带相机。

sentence.content: You might be more comfortable not carrying around heavy rucksacks, though keep your coats and jackets on as it’s quite cold in the museum garden today.
sentence.content_zh: 不过，你可能会觉得不用背着沉重的背包会更舒服，不过还是保持穿着外套，因为博物馆花园里今天相当冷。

sentence.content: I’d like to tell you about the different areas of the museum.
sentence.content_zh: 我想告诉你们关于博物馆的不同区域。

sentence.content: Just inside, and outside the main gallery, we have an area called Four Seasons.
sentence.content_zh: 就在入口内部和主展厅外面，有一个叫做四季的区域。

sentence.content: Here you can watch a four-minute animation of a woodland scene. It was designed especially for the museum by a group of young people on a film studies course, and it’s beautiful.
sentence.content_zh: 在这里，你可以观看一个四分钟的动画木地板场景。这是由一组电影学专业的年轻人为博物馆特别设计的，非常美丽。

sentence.content: Children absolutely love it, but then, so do adults.
sentence.content_zh: 孩子们非常喜欢，成年人也一样。

sentence.content: The main gallery’s called Town and Country.
sentence.content_zh: 主展厅叫做城市与乡村。

sentence.content: It includes a photographic collection of prizewinning sheep and shepherds.
sentence.content_zh: 它包括了一个奖-winning的羊和牧羊人的摄影收藏。

sentence.content: Leaving Town and Country, you enter Farmhouse Kitchen, which is … well, self-explanatory.
sentence.content_zh: 离开城市与乡村，你进入农家厨房，这是...不言自明的。

sentence.content: Here we have the oldest collection of equipment for making butter and cheese in the country.
sentence.content_zh: 这里有国内最古老的制作黄油和奶酪设备收藏。

sentence.content: And this morning, a specialist cheesemaker will be giving demonstrations of how it’s produced.
sentence.content_zh: 今天早上，一位专业的奶酪制造商将会进行示范。

sentence.content: You may even get to try some.
sentence.content_zh: 你甚至可以尝一些。

sentence.content: After that, you can go in two directions.
sentence.content_zh: 在那之后，你可以选择两个方向。

sentence.content: To the right is a staircase that takes you up to a landing from where you can look down on the galleries.
sentence.content_zh: 向右边是一条楼梯，可以带你上到一个平台，从那里你可以俯瞰展览馆。

sentence.content: To the left is a room called A Year on the Farm.
sentence.content_zh: 向左边是一个叫做农场一年的房间。

sentence.content: There’s lots of seating here as sometimes we use the room for school visits, so it’s a good place to stop for a rest.
sentence.content_zh: 这里有很多座位，因为有时候我们会用这个房间接待学校参观，所以这是一个休息的好地方。

sentence.content: If you’re feeling competitive, you can take our memory test in which you answer questions about things you’ve seen in the museum.
sentence.content_zh: 如果你有竞争心，你可以参加我们的记忆测试，回答关于你在博物馆看到的事物的问题。

sentence.content: The next area’s called Wagon Walk. This contains farm carts from nearly every part of the country.
sentence.content_zh: 接下来的区域叫做马车步行区。这里有来自全国各地的农用马车。

sentence.content: It’s surprising how much regional variation there was.
sentence.content_zh: 令人惊讶的是，各地的差异非常大。

sentence.content: Beside the carts are display boards with information about each one.
sentence.content_zh: 马车旁边有展板，上面有关于每个马车的信息。

sentence.content: The carts are old and fragile, so we ask you to keep your children close to you and ensure they don’t climb on the carts.
sentence.content_zh: 马车古老而脆弱，所以我们要求你们让孩子靠近你们，并确保他们不要爬上马车。

sentence.content: From Wagon Walk, you can either make your way back to reception or go out into the garden – or even go back to take another look in the galleries.
sentence.content_zh: 从马车步行区，你可以返回接待处，或者走出去到花园，甚至可以回去再看一下展览馆。

sentence.content: In the far corner of the garden is Bees are Magic, but we’re redeveloping this area so you can’t visit that at the moment.
sentence.content_zh: 在花园的远角是一个叫做蜜蜂的魔法的地方，但我们正在重新开发这个区域，所以目前无法参观。

sentence.content: You can still buy our honey in the shop, though.
sentence.content_zh: 不过你仍然可以在商店购买我们的蜂蜜。

sentence.content: Finally, there’s The Pond, which contains all kinds of interesting wildlife.
sentence.content_zh: 最后，有一个叫做池塘的地方，那里有各种有趣的野生动物。

sentence.content: There are baby ducks that are only a few days old, as well as tiny frogs. The Pond isn’t deep and there’s a fence around it, so it’s perfectly safe for children.
sentence.content_zh: 有几天大的小鸭子，还有小青蛙。池塘不深，周围有围栏，所以对孩子来说是完全安全的。

officialExplain.explain: 本题需要用题干中的关键词来排除干扰项。题干中的originally意为“起初，原来”，这类与时间相关的词容易伴随干扰信息。在原文中building原词重现，结合题干大致定位。was constructed…as…对应题干中的originally，之后提及的相关内容为home of a local businessman，对应B选项的private home。A选项的factory在原文中原词重现，但相关表述是说，这位商人是Palmer饼干工厂的Alfred Palmer，并不是在说博物馆建筑。C选项的a hall of residence在原文中也原词重现，但相关表述为was later sold，意为“后来被出售”，才成为了学生宿舍，不符合题干中的originally。因此本题答案为B。

本题审题时需要注意题干中的关键词entrance fee，意为“入场费”。原文中首先出现free，表示“免费”，紧接着提及这包括了画廊、室外区域以及特别展厅，因此C选项的special exhibitions虽然原词重现，但“免费”这一信息与选项中的charges extra不符，排除C选项。之后原文中children and students原词重现，但相关表述为no charge，与B选项中的discount不符，排除B选项。最后原文提及donation box，意为“捐款箱”，之后的feel free to give whatever amount…，对应A选项。因此本题答案为A。

本题题干中的cloakroom在原文中原词重现，之后cameras、coats和bags都是原词重现。关于cameras，原文表述为keep your cameras with you，因此排除A选项。之后提及not carrying，约等于对应题干中的leave in the cloakroom，相关物品是rucksacks，意为“背包”，同义替换C选项的bags。之后coats再次原词重现，但相关表述是keep your coats and jackets on，因此排除B选项。本题答案为C。

本题题干Four Seasons在原文中原词重现，大致定位。接下来原文中提到animation of a woodland scene以及was designed especially…，对应选项F中的features something，这里的feature作动词，指“以……为特色”。原文中提到a group of young people on a film studies course，得出这些年轻人是学生，对应选项中的students。这里同时需要和D选项作区分，原文中说的是，这是由上电影研究课程的一群年轻人设计的，a group of指“一群”；而D选项说的是only for school groups，意为“仅适用于学校团体”，不符合原文。因此本题选F。
本题题干Farmhouse Kitchen在原文中原词重现，大致定位。之后的原文中，this morning对应G选项中的today，a specialist cheesemaker意为“专业的奶酪制造者（制造商）”或“奶酪制造专家”，对应选项中的expert。因此本题选G。
本题题干A Year on the Farm在原文中原词重现，大致定位。之后的原文中，memory test和answer questions对应E选项中的quiz。因此本题选E。
本题题干Wagon Walk在原文中原词重现，大致定位。之后原文中提及手推车陈旧且易损，结合原文your children判断这里的说话对象是家长，对应A选项中的Parents，children原词重现。本句中提及让孩子们close to you（you指的是家长），以及确保孩子们不要攀爬，对应选项中的supervise，意为“监督，管理”。因此本题选A。
本题题干Bees are Magic在原文中原词重现，大致定位。题干出现之后立即出现转折词but，紧接的内容中redeveloping表示“改造中”或“重新建设中”，原文的can’t visit对应选项C中的closed，原文的at the moment对应选项中的today。因此本题选C。
本题题干The Pond在原文中原词重现，大致定位。之后的原文中提到有baby ducks和tiny frogs，小鸭子们只有几天大，对应B选项中的new things。thing一词不仅可以表示“东西，物品”，在一些语境中还表示“生物，有生命的东西”。因此本题选B。
